## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential partnership between Logic and GrowthX for content marketing and growth strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/ey5qZfyTHSi5WEeH6wfY2YLSdnhAtBoh?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Logic, a 5-person startup, is preparing for go-to-market launch after raising seed funding](https://fathom.video/share/ey5qZfyTHSi5WEeH6wfY2YLSdnhAtBoh?tab=summary&timestamp=182.0)
  - [GrowthX proposed an 8-week strategy sprint ($20k) + ongoing execution ($9k/mo) for content marketing](https://fathom.video/share/ey5qZfyTHSi5WEeH6wfY2YLSdnhAtBoh?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [Steve (Logic CEO) agreed to move forward, aiming to sign today to secure Sept 8th start date](https://fathom.video/share/ey5qZfyTHSi5WEeH6wfY2YLSdnhAtBoh?tab=summary&timestamp=1421.0)
  - [Partnership aligns with Logic's goal to scale GTM efforts efficiently before Series A raise in early 2024](https://fathom.video/share/ey5qZfyTHSi5WEeH6wfY2YLSdnhAtBoh?tab=summary&timestamp=1183.0)

## Topics

### Logic's Current Status and Goals

  - [5-person engineering team, raised seed round last year](https://fathom.video/share/ey5qZfyTHSi5WEeH6wfY2YLSdnhAtBoh?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
  - [\~20 white-glove onboarded customers](https://fathom.video/share/ey5qZfyTHSi5WEeH6wfY2YLSdnhAtBoh?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)
  - [Preparing foundation for go-to-market launch](https://fathom.video/share/ey5qZfyTHSi5WEeH6wfY2YLSdnhAtBoh?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
  - [New head of growth starting Sept 2nd (from dbtlabs)](https://fathom.video/share/ey5qZfyTHSi5WEeH6wfY2YLSdnhAtBoh?tab=summary&timestamp=228.0)
  - [Aiming for Series A raise in early 2024 after 4-6 months of GTM efforts](https://fathom.video/share/ey5qZfyTHSi5WEeH6wfY2YLSdnhAtBoh?tab=summary&timestamp=1181.0)
  - [Goal: Scale efficiently ("5-person, billion-dollar company")](https://fathom.video/share/ey5qZfyTHSi5WEeH6wfY2YLSdnhAtBoh?tab=summary&timestamp=1034.0)

### Logic's Product Overview

  - [Automates business processes from SOPs or user descriptions](https://fathom.video/share/ey5qZfyTHSi5WEeH6wfY2YLSdnhAtBoh?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
  - [Generates UI, test cases, and integration docs](https://fathom.video/share/ey5qZfyTHSi5WEeH6wfY2YLSdnhAtBoh?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Launching workflow library (120 workflows, aiming for 200) as part of GTM strategy](https://fathom.video/share/ey5qZfyTHSi5WEeH6wfY2YLSdnhAtBoh?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)
  - [Targeting industries with large ops teams (e.g., e-commerce, FinTech, health)](https://fathom.video/share/ey5qZfyTHSi5WEeH6wfY2YLSdnhAtBoh?tab=summary&timestamp=530.0)

### GrowthX's Offering

  - [8-week strategy sprint ($20k flat fee)](https://fathom.video/share/ey5qZfyTHSi5WEeH6wfY2YLSdnhAtBoh?tab=summary&timestamp=1209.0)
      - [Develop content strategy, personas, writing guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/ey5qZfyTHSi5WEeH6wfY2YLSdnhAtBoh?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
      - [Create custom knowledge base](https://fathom.video/share/ey5qZfyTHSi5WEeH6wfY2YLSdnhAtBoh?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Ongoing execution ($9k/month)](https://fathom.video/share/ey5qZfyTHSi5WEeH6wfY2YLSdnhAtBoh?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
      - [Daily content production and publishing](https://fathom.video/share/ey5qZfyTHSi5WEeH6wfY2YLSdnhAtBoh?tab=summary&timestamp=1368.0)
      - [Full-service: SEO, design, fact-checking, publishing](https://fathom.video/share/ey5qZfyTHSi5WEeH6wfY2YLSdnhAtBoh?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Positioned as cost-effective alternative to hiring internal team or multiple agencies](https://fathom.video/share/ey5qZfyTHSi5WEeH6wfY2YLSdnhAtBoh?tab=summary&timestamp=1292.0)

### Success Stories and Comparisons

  - [Shared examples: Chiro, DataGrid, Town.com, Tavern](https://fathom.video/share/ey5qZfyTHSi5WEeH6wfY2YLSdnhAtBoh?tab=summary&timestamp=730.0)
  - [Emphasized starting from low domain authority to significant content growth](https://fathom.video/share/ey5qZfyTHSi5WEeH6wfY2YLSdnhAtBoh?tab=summary&timestamp=703.0)
  - [Highlighted value for companies without existing marketing teams](https://fathom.video/share/ey5qZfyTHSi5WEeH6wfY2YLSdnhAtBoh?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)

### Timeline and Next Steps

  - [Proposed start date: September 8th](https://fathom.video/share/ey5qZfyTHSi5WEeH6wfY2YLSdnhAtBoh?tab=summary&timestamp=1099.0)
  - [Steve agreed to sign today to secure the slot](https://fathom.video/share/ey5qZfyTHSi5WEeH6wfY2YLSdnhAtBoh?tab=summary&timestamp=1421.0)
  - [Tyler to send Statement of Work (SOW) for review and signing](https://fathom.video/share/ey5qZfyTHSi5WEeH6wfY2YLSdnhAtBoh?tab=summary&timestamp=1434.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Tyler to send SOW to Steve for review](https://fathom.video/share/ey5qZfyTHSi5WEeH6wfY2YLSdnhAtBoh?tab=summary&timestamp=1518.0)
  - [Steve to sign SOW today to secure September 8th start date](https://fathom.video/share/ey5qZfyTHSi5WEeH6wfY2YLSdnhAtBoh?tab=summary&timestamp=1421.0)
  - [Schedule kickoff meeting for strategy sprint](https://fathom.video/share/ey5qZfyTHSi5WEeH6wfY2YLSdnhAtBoh?tab=summary&timestamp=1434.0)
  - [Align GrowthX efforts with incoming head of growth (starting Sept 2nd)](https://fathom.video/share/ey5qZfyTHSi5WEeH6wfY2YLSdnhAtBoh?tab=summary&timestamp=1099.0)
  - [Marcel to potentially connect Steve with Pedro (Tavern CEO) for reference](https://fathom.video/share/ey5qZfyTHSi5WEeH6wfY2YLSdnhAtBoh?tab=summary&timestamp=1125.0)
